questions.question_text_full: A can finish a piece of the work in 16 days and B can finish it in 12 days. They worked together for 4 days and then A left. B finished the remaining work. For how many total number of days did B work to finish the work completely?
questions.notes: Options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.
